hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file" < /dev/stdin); case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|.eslintrc*|.claude/settings*) echo "BLOCKED: $FILE is a protected file" >&2; exit 2;; esac'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file" < /dev/stdin); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --no-install oxlint "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -30 || true;; esac'
